speaker: charlie
text: Good morning Queensland, it's Thursday April 23rd and welcome to ParkSyde Bright Side. I'm Alex with Jamie, ready to share some cracking good news that'll brighten your day. We've got stories that prove the world's still full of amazing people doing brilliant things.

speaker: alice
text: Too right Alex! Today we're celebrating brilliant women changing the world, incredible scientific breakthroughs, and some fantastic sporting news. Plus Sam's got your warm autumn weather update because this dry spell is treating us beautifully.

speaker: charlie
text: Absolutely mate. From underground fungi saving our climate to particle physics winning millions, we've got stories that'll remind you why being curious about our world pays off. Let's dive into the green news first, shall we?
